raw_transcript: Thanks, Doctor. Yeah, honestly, the Omeprazole... it just doesn't seem to touch it anymore. Every single night, regardless of what I eat, I wake up with this burning in my throat. It's like battery acid. I'm taking 40 milligrams twice a day, but I'm still miserable.
final_corrected_note: Thanks, Doctor. Yeah, honestly, the Omeprazole... it just doesn't seem to touch it anymore. Every single night, regardless of what I eat, I wake up with this burning in my throat. It's like battery acid. I'm taking 40 milligrams twice a day, but I'm still miserable.
